name: Slidotron_16x9

consumes.minimum: 1 active CompItem in the project panel
consumes.description: Reads the active project item (must be a CompItem). Uses its name to build expression references, then adds layers and sub-compositions into it.

functions: adds 'Sliders 16x9' comp as a layer in the active comp
adds a 'CTRL' Slider Control effect to the Sliders 16x9 layer with an initial value of 116
creates 'Mask L' and 'Mask R' shape layers (disabled) inside Sliders 16x9
adds two instances of 'Slide 16x9' as alpha track matte layers beneath Mask L and Mask R
sets parent-child relationships so each Slide 16x9 layer inherits its mask's position
writes linear-interpolation expressions on Mask L and Mask R X-position, driven by the CTRL slider (0–100 → left/right reveal positions)

scriptSim.scenario: success — builds 16x9 slider rig from active comp
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'My Project' (1920x1080, 30fps, 30s); no layers selected

operations.target: Mask L / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0
Mask R / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0

expressions.target: Sliders 16x9 / Mask L / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0

sim.note: Sweeps the CTRL slider from 0 to 100; maps to X position range -5 (fully left) to 1920 (center) for Mask L

expressions.target: Sliders 16x9 / Mask R / ADBE Transform Group / ADBE Position_0

sim.note: Sweeps the CTRL slider from 0 to 100; maps to X position range 3840 (fully right) to 1920 (center) for Mask R

notes: HEADLESS — runs immediately on the active comp with no UI dialog.
Output comps are fixed at 3840x2160, 60fps, 600s regardless of the input comp dimensions.
Background color of generated comps is dark gray [38, 38, 38] (≈ 0.149 normalized).
Mask L and Mask R shape layers are disabled (enabled=false) by default; they act as alpha mattes only.
The CTRL slider initial value is 116 (outside the expression's 0–100 input range), placing Mask L at x≈1920 and Mask R past 1920*2 at creation time.
Expressions reference the active comp by name at script run-time; renaming that comp afterward will break the expression linkage.
Slide 16x9 is added twice — once under each mask — so both left and right slide panels share the same source content comp.
The script uses carriage-return (\r) as a line separator in expression strings (AE ExtendScript convention).
